      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee irr to Naudu fa-
bruscht/ kas ta KUNga Nam-
d atrasta/ un irr to teem Wehr-
indeereim un Strahdneefeem
Rohkâ dewutchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl stahstija Sawans
as Skrihweris tam Kehnimam/
n tazzija: Tas Breesteris Ilki-
as irr man Grahmatu dewis/
n Sawans laftija eefsch tahs
teeefsch ta Kehnina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu tas Kehninsch
ahs Baufslbas Wahrdus dsir-
ceja/ tad saplohfija winsch fa-
vas Drehbes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch paweh-
eja Ilkijum/ un Aitawam Sa-
vana Dehlam/ un Abdonam
Mika Dehlam/ un Sawanam
tam Skrihweram / un Asajam
tam Kehnina Kalpam/ un tazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eita/ waizajset to KUN-
GU par mann/ un par wiﬀeem
Atliktifscheem eefsch Israëta un
Juhda/ pahr fchahs Grahmatas
Wahrdeem/ kas atrasta irr. Jo
ta KUNGA Bahrsiba irr leela/
kas pahr mums eedeggust/ ta-
pehz ka muhsu Tehwi ne irr tur-
teifichi ta KUNGA Wahrdnu/ ka
tee buhtn darrijschi pehz wiﬀu/
kas jchâi Grahmata rakstihts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nogabje Ilkijus ar
teem/ kas tam Kehnimam pee-
derreja/ pee tahs Praweetes Ul-
das/ Salluma/ Takeata Dehla/
ta Dehla Asra / ta Drehbju-
Sarga/ Seewas/ ta patti dsih-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta tazzija us teem:
Ta fakka tas KUNGS Israë-
ta Deews: Sakajt tam Wiḥ-
rain/ kas juhs pee manni fuh-
tijs irr/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Rangi / es weddischu Nelaimi
pahr fcho Weetu/ un pahr win-
ras Eedsihwotajeem / wisnis
tohs Lahstus/ kas tai Grahnia-
tâ rakstiti irr/ ko tee preekfch to
Kehninu no Juhda laftijicht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tee mann trr
atsahjufschi/ un zitteim Deerveent
kwchpinajfschi / ka tee mann ap-
kattinatu ar wiﬀeem saweem
Rohku Darbeem/ tad taps man-
na Bahrsiba prett fcho Weetu
eededsinata/ un ne taps tsdschsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet us to Kehninu no
Juhda / kas juhs irr tuhtijs to
KUNGU waiuht/ buhs jums
ta tazzibt: Ta fakka tas KUNgs
Israëta Deews no teem Wahrd-
deem/ ko tu effi klanzijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ka tawa Sirde
irr mihksta tappusi/ un tn effi
preekfch Deewu pasemmojees
winna Wahrdus prett fcho Wee-
tu un winnas Eedsihwotajeem
dsrdedams / un effi manna
Preefschá pasemmojees/ un ta-
was Drehbes taplohfiijs / un
preekfch mannim raudajs/ tad ti-
es tew etmu paktaufijs / fakka
tas KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Reds/ es preekfchu tew-
pee taweem Tehweem/ un tu
"
